description.p: BExplorer is a native Rust desktop file explorer focused on fast file management, split-pane workflows, archive handling, previews, and a compact interface.
Compact-image, rename, scrolling, and release-packaging update.

ul.li: Fixed Control-key scrolling and filename-extension editing in every file view.
Added dedicated compact thumbnails and native icons for small views and the sidebar.
Added automated Windows Setup, Debian, and RPM package generation.

description.p: Linux desktop integration and native properties update.

ul.li: Added compact native Properties and functional Open with workflows on Linux.
Improved symbolic links, keyboard navigation, and address-bar focus handling.
Added XDG application chooser portal and complementary KIO/KIOFuse discovery.
Improved Debian dependencies, themed icons, and default file-manager invocation.

description.p: Maintenance release with Windows and Linux integration refinements.

ul.li: Fixed the transient Windows frame shown during the first external file drag.
Improved printer artwork and Windows release packaging.
Refined Linux storage, formatting, blur, drag-and-drop, and shutdown behavior.

description.p: First stable BExplorer release for Windows and Linux.

ul.li: Tabbed and split-pane file management with session restore.
Reliable queued transfers, conflict handling, archives, search, and previews.
Native Windows integration and desktop-neutral Linux integration.
